hero.art_prompt: Priya, a 20 year old Indian student in smart-casual, confident and relieved, starting an online university application on a laptop at home, bright hopeful mood.

panels.narration: Priya wanted to join JAIN but felt unsure how.
panels.img_prompt: Priya, 20, with a laptop looking unsure at an admissions page, hopeful but puzzled, tidy home.

panels.narration: The steps and documents felt scattered.
panels.img_prompt: Priya with a few documents and notes, trying to make sense of admission steps, focused and determined.

panels.narration: Then she found one simple online admission process.
panels.img_prompt: Priya smiling with relief at a laptop showing a clean, simple step-by-step admission process, warm bright home.

panels.narration: She applied in minutes, guided at every step.
panels.img_prompt: Priya happily submitting her application on a laptop, a small confident thumbs up, proud and relieved, warm light.

turn.title: How JAIN Admission Works
points: Simple eligibility: class 12 for UG programmes, a bachelor's degree for PG.
The whole application is online, so you can apply from home in minutes.
No entrance exam. Admission is merit based, and working professionals are welcome.
Upload your documents, pay the registration fee, and a counsellor guides you through.

testimonials.name: Priya Joshi
testimonials.quote: I thought admission would be stressful. The online steps were clear and a counsellor guided me.

testimonials.name: Rohan Gupta
testimonials.quote: No entrance exam. I applied on merit and joined the programme I wanted.

testimonials.name: Aisha Khan
testimonials.quote: I applied from my phone at home. It took only a few minutes.

testimonials.name: Nikhil Rao
testimonials.quote: Every time I had a doubt, my counsellor answered. Admission felt easy.

facts.v: Class 12 for UG, a bachelor's degree for PG
